hypothesis_rows.hypothesis: Shared wall-loss boundary underpredicts ambient exchange
hypothesis_rows.evidence_for: Ambient-loss proxy error stays clustered near 17-21% for Salt 2-4 and near 27% for Salt 1 while Jin/Kirst changes do not remove the bias.
hypothesis_rows.evidence_against: Ambient-loss error alone does not explain the large mdot spread across Jin/Kirst and Salt 1-4.
hypothesis_rows.low_cost_test: Recompute report metrics after a wall-loss sensitivity centered on Salt 2 validation and Salt 4 Jin.

hypothesis_rows.hypothesis: Hydraulic resistance is too high in the upper-left loop path
hypothesis_rows.evidence_for: Upper-leg |Δp_rgh| dominates every salt row, and Jin usually lowers upper-leg/left-leg loss together with better mdot agreement.
hypothesis_rows.evidence_against: Pressure data are latest-time only in the current package; full transient pressure-history confirmation is still pending.
hypothesis_rows.low_cost_test: Build transient p_rgh history extraction for the upper leg, left leg, and test-section branch before changing geometry.

hypothesis_rows.hypothesis: Constant Cp is not the leading-order cause of the mdot mismatch
hypothesis_rows.evidence_for: All salt rows share effectively constant Cp=1423.47, yet mdot changes materially between Jin and Kirst while ambient-loss bias remains clustered.
hypothesis_rows.evidence_against: Cp still affects buoyancy through enthalpy-temperature conversion and should not be ruled out permanently without a focused sensitivity.
hypothesis_rows.low_cost_test: Defer Cp sensitivity until after wall-loss and resistance-coupling checks, because those levers have stronger evidence today.

hypothesis_rows.hypothesis: Salt 1 is a coupled low-power regime problem, not just missing runtime
hypothesis_rows.evidence_for: Salt 1 remains about 4% off in net heat balance even when flat in time, and both temperature and mdot errors are much worse than Salt 2-4.
hypothesis_rows.evidence_against: The Salt 1 continuations have not yet been extended successfully after the new runtime path was introduced.
hypothesis_rows.low_cost_test: Continue both Salt 1 Jin and Salt 1 Kirst with the repaired bootstrap before proposing lower-power wall-loss or cooler-h sensitivities.
